scripts.dev:warm: concurrently "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev" "node scripts/warmup.mjs"
scripts.dev:ready: concurrently "pnpm --filter api dev" "node scripts/dev-launch.mjs" "pnpm --filter web dev" "node scripts/warmup.mjs"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @taskapp/db build && pnpm --filter api build && pnpm --filter web build
